**New feature**
A clear description of the new feature, what it is for, whether it solves any problem.

**Screenshots**
Illustrative examples of features, if possible.

**Additional context**
Implementation examples, clarifications, resources.

**Additional context**
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
